assessment.focus_note: Continuing to deepen research into geopolitical dynamics of the Iran conflict, particularly around the Strait of Hormuz and US disengagement, and how it relates to political vulnerability and foreign influence, while also tracking significant global economic shifts and the societal impact of AI and rapidly evolving military technology.
